name: California Check Cashing Stores
description_short: Sacramento, CA check cashing at California Check Cashing Stores on Florin Rd offers fast cash advances and check cashing.
description_long:
California Check Cashing Stores operates at 6154 Florin Rd in Sacramento, CA. This location serves the Florin area with extended weekday hours (9AM-7PM Monday through Friday) and Saturday hours (10AM-4PM). The standalone storefront is designed for quick, convenient access to check cashing services.

At this Sacramento location, you can cash personal checks, payroll checks, and government checks while accessing money transfer and payday advance services. Call 916-422-2435 to confirm availability of specific services or to discuss your check cashing needs with staff.

Sacramento residents visiting this Florin Rd location should bring a valid photo ID and the check to be cashed. California Check Cashing Stores has served this community for years with reliable, accessible check cashing solutions.
pros: Multiple San Francisco locations (at least 3 known branches) for neighborhood accessibility
Extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM) accommodate working customers
Payday advances available both in-store and online
Combined services including check cashing, bill pay, money orders, and tax prep at same location
Western Union money transfer and money order services available
Green Dot debit card issuance for unbanked/underbanked customers
Clear disclosure of loan costs and consumer protections on website
cons: Payday loan maximum of $250 is relatively low for emergency cash needs
No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on the website
Website lacks transparency on actual loan costs despite consumer warnings about expense
Loan eligibility based on underwriting criteria means many applicants will be denied
Sunday closures and limited Saturday hours (10 AM–4 PM) reduce access for some customers
best_for: Unbanked/underbanked San Francisco residents needing check cashing and immediate cash access
Workers seeking small payroll advances between paychecks
Customers needing multiple money services (wire transfers, money orders, bill pay) in one location
diagnosis: California Check Cashing Stores is best for San Francisco residents and workers who need quick access to check cashing, small emergency cash advances, or money transfer services and prefer in-person service at neighborhood locations. However, customers should be aware that payday loans and cash advances carry high costs when used repeatedly, and specific fee/APR details are not disclosed online—rates and terms should be reviewed in-store before applying.
services: Green Dot Visa debit card issuance
Customer support via email and phone
meta_description: Sacramento, CA check cashing at California Check Cashing Stores, 6154 Florin Rd. Fast cash advances and check cashing.
